title: genista supina
intro: Genista supina, also known as prostrate broom or creeping broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a low-growing, shrubby perennial that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Genista supina can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
